title: SpyFu Ad History API Schemas
description: JSON Schema definitions for SpyFu Ad History API API responses

AdHistoryApi_GetDomainAdHistory_GET.title: Get Domain Ad History
AdHistoryApi_GetDomainAdHistory_GET.description: Response wrapper containing domain ad history results with pagination metadata.

results.description: Array of ads with their associated keywords found for the specified domain.

keywords.description: List of keywords that triggered this ad to appear in search results.

position.description: The ad's position on the search results page when it was captured (1 = top position).

searchDateId.description: Date when this ad was captured by SpyFu's crawling system, formatted as YYYYMMDD (e.g., 20231215 = December 15, 2023).

title.description: The headline text of the ad as it appeared in search results.

body.description: The description text of the ad providing additional details about the offer.
examples: Discover premium running shoes with advanced cushioning technology. Shop now and save 20% on your first order.

url.description: The landing page URL that the ad directed users to when clicked.

adId.description: Unique identifier for this specific ad in SpyFu's database.

items.description: Represents an ad with associated keywords that triggered it to appear in search results.

AdHistoryApi_GetTermAdHistory_GET.title: Get Keyword Ad History
AdHistoryApi_GetTermAdHistory_GET.description: Response wrapper containing term ad history results with pagination metadata.

results.description: Array of ads found for the specified keyword with associated landing pages and advertiser information.

domainName.description: The domain name of the advertiser who placed this ad.

urls.description: List of landing page URLs that this ad directed users to when clicked.

position.description: The ad's position on the search results page when it was captured (1 = top position).

searchDateId.description: Date when this ad was captured by SpyFu's crawling system, formatted as YYYYMMDD (e.g., 20231215 = December 15, 2023).

title.description: The headline text of the ad as it appeared in search results.

body.description: The description text of the ad providing additional details about the offer.
examples: Discover premium running shoes with advanced cushioning technology. Shop now and save 20% on your first order.

adId.description: Unique identifier for this specific ad in SpyFu's database.

items.description: Represents ad data for a specific keyword with associated advertiser information and landing pages.

AdHistoryApi_GetTermAdHistoryWithStats_G.title: Get Keyword Ad History With Stats
AdHistoryApi_GetTermAdHistoryWithStats_G.description: Response wrapper containing comprehensive term ad history statistics including advertiser analysis and top-performing ads.

domains.description: Array of domains (advertisers) that have purchased ads for the specified keyword, ranked by performance metrics.

ads.description: Collection of ads this domain has purchased for the specified keyword.

searchDateId.description: Date when this ad was captured by SpyFu's crawling system, formatted as YYYYMMDD (e.g., 20231215 = December 15, 2023).

position.description: The ad's position on the search results page when it was captured (1 = top position).

title.description: The headline text of the ad as it appeared in search results.

body.description: The description text of the ad providing additional details about the offer.
examples: Discover premium running shoes with advanced cushioning technology. Shop now and save 20% on your first order.

domainName.description: The domain name of the advertiser who placed this ad.

fullUrl.description: The complete landing page URL that the ad directed users to when clicked.

term.description: The search keyword that triggered this ad to appear in search results.

adCount.description: The number of times this specific ad variation was observed during the capture period.

isLeaderboardAd.description: Indicates whether this ad appeared in the top ad positions (leaderboard) rather than sidebar positions.

items.description: Represents a single ad from SpyFu's historical advertising database with complete ad copy and metadata.

budget.description: Estimated monthly advertising budget this domain spends on the specified keyword.

coverage.description: Percentage of time this domain appears in ads for the specified keyword (0-100).

domainName.description: The domain name of the advertiser.

percentageLeaderboard.description: Percentage of time this domain's ads appear in top positions (leaderboard) rather than sidebar positions.

totalAdsPurchased.description: Total number of ads this domain has purchased across all keywords in SpyFu's database.

adCount.description: Number of ads this domain has purchased specifically for the requested keyword.

items.description: Represents an advertiser (domain) that purchases ads for a specific keyword, including their ad performance metrics and budget estimates.

topAds.description: Array of the most successful ads for the specified keyword, ranked by performance and frequency metrics.

adId.description: Unique identifier for this specific ad in SpyFu's database.

averagePosition.description: Average position where this ad appeared on search results pages across all observations.

averageAdCount.description: Average total number of ads per capture period.

body.description: The description text of the ad providing additional details about the offer.
examples: Discover premium running shoes with advanced cushioning technology. Shop now and save 20% on your first order.

title.description: The headline text of the ad as it appeared in search results.

fullUrl.description: The complete landing page URL that the ad directed users to when clicked.

leaderboardCount.description: Number of times this ad appeared in top ad positions (leaderboard) rather than sidebar positions.

percentageLeaderboard.description: Percentage of time this ad appeared in top ad positions versus sidebar positions.

percentageAdsServed.description: Percentage of total ad impressions this specific ad variation represented for the advertiser.

items.description: Represents a top-performing ad with aggregated performance metrics across multiple observations.
